## Hybrid-Team Review Checklist

- [ ] Artifact is in the correct directory
- [ ] Audience and purpose are clear
- [ ] Alternatives were compared when a structure, standard, or policy was chosen
- [ ] Conclusions are separated from assumptions
- [ ] Related issues, PRs, research, or experiments are linked
- [ ] Navigation is updated
- [ ] Sensitive data is absent or sanitized
- [ ] Validation checks are listed
